meta.description: Research/Tech Track - branching faction progression (Dune: Imperium Immortality-inspired)

track.name: Field Operations
track.description: Establishes forward operating bases. +1 intel asset slot.

track.name: Supply Lines
track.description: Secures reliable supply chains. +20 credits per mission.

track.name: Combat Training
track.description: Advanced tactical drills. +1 starting tactic cards per mission.

track.name: Medical Bay
track.description: Field hospital reduces recovery time. Heal 3 wounds between missions for free.

track.name: Counter-Intelligence
track.description: Disrupts imperial communications. Reduce threat by 3 per mission.

track.name: Black Market Access
track.description: Underworld connections yield discounts. 15% off all shops.

track.name: Allied Network
track.description: Expanded contacts. +1 companion slot and +1 mercenary slot.

track.name: Rally Cry
track.description: Inspirational leadership. +2 starting morale for all missions.

track.name: Elite Training
track.description: Rigorous XP program. +3 bonus XP per mission for all heroes.
